requirement_topic.en: Respiratory PPE Performance Requirements — Georgian GOST-Based Standards (Filtration, Breathing Resistance, Fit)
requirement_topic.zh: 呼吸防护PPE性能要求——格鲁吉亚GOST基础标准（过滤效率、呼吸阻力、密合性）
requirement_topic.zht: 呼吸防護PPE性能要求——格魯吉亞GOST基礎標準（過濾效率、呼吸阻力、密合性）

summary.en: Filtering facepiece respirators placed on the Georgian market must meet the performance requirements of the applicable GeoSTM national standard. Georgia's standards for respiratory protection are GOST-based, principally drawing on GOST 12.4.294 (Respiratory protective equipment — Filtering half masks to protect against particles — Requirements, testing, marking, adopted from EN 149) and/or GOST 12.4.296 (Respiratory protective devices — Filtering half masks — Requirements, testing, marking). Where Georgia has formally adopted EN 149 as a national standard via GeoSTM, the EN 149:2001+A1:2009 performance requirements (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3 classes, filtration efficiency against NaCl and paraffin oil aerosols, total inward leakage, breathing resistance, CO2 content, practical performance test, dolomite clogging, flammability) would apply. Exporters must confirm with GeoSTM which specific standard version is currently in force. Grid and voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) match China's supply — this is not a performance differentiator for passive respiratory PPE.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的过滤式半面罩呼吸器须满足适用GeoSTM国家标准的性能要求。格鲁吉亚的呼吸防护标准以GOST为基础，主要参照GOST 12.4.294（呼吸防护装备——防颗粒物过滤式半面罩——要求、测试、标识，采标自EN 149）和/或GOST 12.4.296（呼吸防护装备——过滤式半面罩——要求、测试、标识）。如格鲁吉亚已通过GeoSTM正式采标EN 149作为国家标准，则EN 149:2001+A1:2009的性能要求适用（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3等级、对NaCl和石蜡油气溶胶的过滤效率、总向内泄漏率、呼吸阻力、CO2含量、实际性能测试、白云石堵塞测试、阻燃性）。出口商须向GeoSTM确认当前生效的具体标准版本。电网及电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国电网一致——这对被动式呼吸防护PPE不构成性能差异。
summary.zht: 投放格魯吉亞市場的過濾式半面罩呼吸器須滿足適用GeoSTM國家標準的性能要求。格魯吉亞的呼吸防護標準以GOST為基礎，主要參照GOST 12.4.294（呼吸防護裝備——防顆粒物過濾式半面罩——要求、測試、標識，採標自EN 149）和/或GOST 12.4.296（呼吸防護裝備——過濾式半面罩——要求、測試、標識）。如格魯吉亞已通過GeoSTM正式採標EN 149作為國家標準，則EN 149:2001+A1:2009的性能要求適用（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3等級、對NaCl和石蠟油氣溶膠的過濾效率、總向內洩漏率、呼吸阻力、CO2含量、實際性能測試、白雲石堵塞測試、阻燃性）。出口商須向GeoSTM確認當前生效的具體標準版本。電網及電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國電網一致——這對被動式呼吸防護PPE不構成性能差異。

standards_or_laws: GOST 12.4.294 — Respiratory protective equipment — Filtering half masks to protect against particles (EN 149 adoption via GOST)
GOST 12.4.296 — Respiratory protective devices — Filtering half masks — Requirements, testing, marking
GeoSTM national standard adoption — confirm current version and status with GeoSTM before testing

summary.en: China's primary standard for non-powered air-purifying particle respirators is GB 2626-2019 (mandatory national standard), covering two performance classes: KN90 (filtration efficiency >=90% against NaCl) and KN95 (filtration efficiency >=95% against NaCl, 85 L/min). GB 2626-2019 uses NaCl aerosol only (unlike EN 149 / GOST 12.4.294 which also require paraffin oil aerosol testing). GB 2626 does not require the simulated workplace practical performance test (total inward leakage on human subjects) that EN 149-based standards mandate. CCC certification by a CNCA-authorised body is compulsory for GB 2626 respirators in China. Labour-protection (LA) certification baseline also applies for occupational respirators.
summary.zh: 中国非动力防颗粒物净气式呼吸器的主要标准为GB 2626-2019（强制性国家标准），覆盖两个性能等级：KN90（对NaCl过滤效率≥90%）和KN95（对NaCl过滤效率≥95%，流量85 L/min）。GB 2626-2019仅使用NaCl气溶胶（而EN 149/GOST 12.4.294还要求石蜡油气溶胶检测）。GB 2626不要求EN 149基础标准所规定的模拟工作场所实际性能测试（在人体上测定总向内泄漏率）。中国GB 2626呼吸器须由国家认监委（CNCA）授权机构完成强制性产品认证（CCC）。劳动防护（LA）认证基准也适用于职业用呼吸器。
summary.zht: 中國非動力防顆粒物淨氣式呼吸器的主要標準為GB 2626-2019（強制性國家標準），覆蓋兩個性能等級：KN90（對NaCl過濾效率≥90%）和KN95（對NaCl過濾效率≥95%，流量85 L/min）。GB 2626-2019僅使用NaCl氣溶膠（而EN 149/GOST 12.4.294還要求石蠟油氣溶膠檢測）。GB 2626不要求EN 149基礎標準所規定的模擬工作場所實際性能測試（在人體上測定總向內洩漏率）。中國GB 2626呼吸器須由國家認監委（CNCA）授權機構完成強制性產品認證（CCC）。勞動防護（LA）認證基準也適用於職業用呼吸器。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Respiratory protective equipment — Non-powered air-purifying particle respirator (mandatory, SAMR/CNCA, CCC required)
GB 19083-2010 — Technical requirements for medical protective mask (NMPA Class II medical device)
GB/T 32610-2016 — Technical specification of daily protective mask (voluntary, general public — not industrial PPE)

gap.en: GB 2626-2019 (KN95) test reports do not automatically satisfy Georgian GeoSTM requirements. Key gaps: (1) If the applicable Georgian standard is GOST 12.4.294 (EN 149 adoption), paraffin oil aerosol testing is required in addition to NaCl — GB 2626 does not cover this; (2) A simulated workplace performance test (total inward leakage on human subjects) is required under EN 149-derived GOST standards but absent from GB 2626; (3) Dolomite clogging test (for valve-fitted models) is required under EN 149-based standards but not under GB 2626; (4) Re-testing against the applicable GeoSTM/GOST standard at a GeoSTM-recognised laboratory is typically required; (5) Exporters must confirm which GOST or GeoSTM standard version is currently mandated before commencing product testing.
gap.zh: GB 2626-2019（KN95）检测报告不自动满足格鲁吉亚GeoSTM要求。主要差距：（1）若适用的格鲁吉亚标准为GOST 12.4.294（EN 149采标版），除NaCl外还须进行石蜡油气溶胶检测——GB 2626未涵盖此项；（2）EN 149派生的GOST标准要求在人体上进行模拟工作场所性能测试（总向内泄漏率），而GB 2626不要求；（3）带阀型号须通过白云石堵塞测试（EN 149基础标准要求），GB 2626不包含此项；（4）通常须在GeoSTM认可实验室按适用GeoSTM/GOST标准重新检测；（5）出口商须在开始产品检测前确认当前强制执行的GOST或GeoSTM标准版本。
gap.zht: GB 2626-2019（KN95）檢測報告不自動滿足格魯吉亞GeoSTM要求。主要差距：（1）若適用的格魯吉亞標準為GOST 12.4.294（EN 149採標版），除NaCl外還須進行石蠟油氣溶膠檢測——GB 2626未涵蓋此項；（2）EN 149派生的GOST標準要求在人體上進行模擬工作場所性能測試（總向內洩漏率），而GB 2626不要求；（3）帶閥型號須通過白雲石堵塞測試（EN 149基礎標準要求），GB 2626不包含此項；（4）通常須在GeoSTM認可實驗室按適用GeoSTM/GOST標準重新檢測；（5）出口商須在開始產品檢測前確認當前強制執行的GOST或GeoSTM標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — applicable GeoSTM/GOST performance standard must be met; GB 2626 test reports are not automatically accepted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626-2019 compliance enforced by SAMR; CCC certification (type test + factory inspection) required for domestic market

source.publisher: GeoSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgian respiratory PPE performance requirements are based on GOST 12.4.294 / GOST 12.4.296 (EN 149 family). Chinese GB 2626-2019 (KN95) test reports do not satisfy these requirements because they omit paraffin oil aerosol testing, the simulated workplace performance test, and (for valved models) dolomite clogging testing. Re-testing at a GeoSTM-recognised laboratory to the applicable GOST/GeoSTM standard is required. Confirm current standard version and accredited laboratories with GeoSTM before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚呼吸防护PPE性能要求基于GOST 12.4.294/GOST 12.4.296（EN 149系列）。中国GB 2626-2019（KN95）检测报告不满足上述要求，原因是未包含石蜡油气溶胶检测、模拟工作场所性能测试，以及带阀型号的白云石堵塞测试。须在GeoSTM认可实验室按适用GOST/GeoSTM标准重新检测。检测前须向GeoSTM确认当前标准版本及认可实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 格魯吉亞呼吸防護PPE性能要求基於GOST 12.4.294/GOST 12.4.296（EN 149系列）。中國GB 2626-2019（KN95）檢測報告不滿足上述要求，原因是未包含石蠟油氣溶膠檢測、模擬工作場所性能測試，以及帶閥型號的白雲石堵塞測試。須在GeoSTM認可實驗室按適用GOST/GeoSTM標準重新檢測。檢測前須向GeoSTM確認當前標準版本及認可實驗室。

requirement_topic.en: RoHS / Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Force in Georgia; Not Applicable to Respiratory PPE
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS/有害物质——格鲁吉亚尚无生效的横向RoHS制度；不适用于呼吸防护PPE
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS/有害物質——格魯吉亞尚無生效的橫向RoHS制度；不適用於呼吸防護PPE

summary.en: Georgia does not have a fully-in-force horizontal RoHS (Restriction of Hazardous Substances) regime equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU or the EAEU TR CU 037/2016. The EU-Georgia DCFTA provides a framework for gradual technical approximation, but as of the knowledge cutoff (August 2025) no mandatory horizontal RoHS restriction law covering respiratory PPE has been formally adopted and enforced in Georgia. For filtering facepiece respirators (passive respiratory protection products), RoHS-type restrictions on electronic component hazardous substances are not directly applicable to the product category — FFP masks contain no electronic components. Exporters should nonetheless monitor GeoSTM updates and any DCFTA-driven chemical restriction measures that may be adopted during the approximation process.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚目前尚无全面生效的横向RoHS（有害物质限制）制度，相当于欧盟指令2011/65/EU或欧亚经济联盟TR CU 037/2016。欧格深化全面自由贸易区协议为逐步技术靠拢提供了框架，但截至知识截止日期（2025年8月），格鲁吉亚尚未正式采用并执行涵盖呼吸防护PPE的强制性横向RoHS限制法规。对于过滤式半面罩呼吸器（被动式呼吸防护产品），针对电子元件有害物质的RoHS类限制要求不直接适用于该产品类别——FFP口罩不含电子元件。出口商仍应关注GeoSTM更新动态及深化全面自由贸易区协议推动下可能在接轨过程中采用的任何化学物质限制措施。
summary.zht: 格魯吉亞目前尚無全面生效的橫向RoHS（有害物質限制）制度，相當於歐盟指令2011/65/EU或歐亞經濟聯盟TR CU 037/2016。歐格深化全面自由貿易區協議為逐步技術靠攏提供了框架，但截至知識截止日期（2025年8月），格魯吉亞尚未正式採用並執行涵蓋呼吸防護PPE的強制性橫向RoHS限制法規。對於過濾式半面罩呼吸器（被動式呼吸防護產品），針對電子元件有害物質的RoHS類限制要求不直接適用於該產品類別——FFP口罩不含電子元件。出口商仍應關注GeoSTM更新動態及深化全面自由貿易區協議推動下可能在接軌過程中採用的任何化學物質限制措施。

standards_or_laws: EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) — NOT in force in Georgia; referenced for approximation context only
EAEU TR CU 037/2016 — NOT applicable to Georgia (non-EAEU state)
EU-Georgia DCFTA — approximation framework; chemical restriction measures may be adopted progressively

summary.en: China's primary hazardous substances restriction for electrical and electronic products is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products) and the China RoHS framework (Management Methods for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, 2016 revision). These apply to electrical and electronic products — not to passive filtering facepiece respirators (FFP masks), which contain no electronic components. There is no equivalent Chinese RoHS obligation for respiratory PPE under GB 2626-2019.
summary.zh: 中国电气电子产品有害物质限制的主要制度为GB/T 26572-2011（电气电子产品中限用物质的限量要求）及中国RoHS框架（《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》，2016年修订版）。上述规定适用于电气电子产品——不适用于不含电子元件的被动式过滤半面罩呼吸器（FFP口罩）。依据GB 2626-2019，呼吸防护PPE无等效的中国RoHS义务。
summary.zht: 中國電氣電子產品有害物質限制的主要制度為GB/T 26572-2011（電氣電子產品中限用物質的限量要求）及中國RoHS框架（《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》，2016年修訂版）。上述規定適用於電氣電子產品——不適用於不含電子元件的被動式過濾半面罩呼吸器（FFP口罩）。依據GB 2626-2019，呼吸防護PPE無等效的中國RoHS義務。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Concentration limits for restricted substances in electrical and electronic products (China RoHS — not applicable to passive respiratory PPE)
GB 2626-2019 — No RoHS-equivalent provision for filtering facepiece respirators

gap.en: No gap on RoHS/hazardous substances for filtering facepiece respirators in the Georgia context: (1) Georgia has no fully-in-force horizontal RoHS regime as of August 2025; (2) FFP masks are passive products with no electronic components — RoHS-type substance restrictions do not apply to this product category in any case; (3) Exporters should monitor GeoSTM and DCFTA approximation updates for any future chemical restriction measures; (4) Material safety considerations for filter media, straps, and nose clips may be covered under general product safety or occupational health law — confirm with Georgian authorities if applicable.
gap.zh: 在格鲁吉亚，过滤式半面罩呼吸器的RoHS/有害物质方面不存在差距：（1）截至2025年8月，格鲁吉亚尚无全面生效的横向RoHS制度；（2）FFP口罩为不含电子元件的被动产品——RoHS类物质限制无论如何均不适用于该产品类别；（3）出口商应关注GeoSTM及深化全面自由贸易区协议接轨进展，监测未来可能采用的化学物质限制措施；（4）过滤材料、系带及鼻夹的材料安全要求可能受一般产品安全或职业健康法律覆盖——如适用，须向格鲁吉亚主管部门确认。
gap.zht: 在格魯吉亞，過濾式半面罩呼吸器的RoHS/有害物質方面不存在差距：（1）截至2025年8月，格魯吉亞尚無全面生效的橫向RoHS制度；（2）FFP口罩為不含電子元件的被動產品——RoHS類物質限制無論如何均不適用於該產品類別；（3）出口商應關注GeoSTM及深化全面自由貿易區協議接軌進展，監測未來可能採用的化學物質限制措施；（4）過濾材料、系帶及鼻夾的材料安全要求可能受一般產品安全或職業健康法律覆蓋——如適用，須向格魯吉亞主管部門確認。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — no horizontal RoHS regime in force in Georgia for respiratory PPE as of August 2025; monitor DCFTA approximation updates
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China RoHS applies to electrical/electronic products only; no RoHS obligation for passive filtering facepiece respirators under GB 2626-2019

source.publisher: GeoSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia has no fully-in-force horizontal RoHS regime as of August 2025, and RoHS-type restrictions do not apply to passive filtering facepiece respirators (no electronic components). This topic is not a compliance gap for respiratory PPE exports to Georgia at this time. Monitor GeoSTM and EU-Georgia DCFTA approximation updates for any future chemical restriction obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2025年8月，格鲁吉亚尚无全面生效的横向RoHS制度，且RoHS类限制不适用于被动式过滤半面罩呼吸器（不含电子元件）。目前该议题对呼吸防护PPE出口格鲁吉亚不构成合规差距。请关注GeoSTM及欧格深化全面自由贸易区协议接轨更新，以了解未来可能出现的化学物质限制义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2025年8月，格魯吉亞尚無全面生效的橫向RoHS制度，且RoHS類限制不適用於被動式過濾半面罩呼吸器（不含電子元件）。目前該議題對呼吸防護PPE出口格魯吉亞不構成合規差距。請關注GeoSTM及歐格深化全面自由貿易區協議接軌更新，以了解未來可能出現的化學物質限制義務。
